arts.ttl: Thiago Alcantara to get coach role after Liverpool exit – Job at CL club can be closed by January
arts.sum: Thiago Alcantara could be set to return to Barcelona in a coaching role in the January transfer window as he works on his career after leaving Liverpool in the summer. That’s according to Marca, who report that a deal for the former Liverpool man could be done in January as Barcelona eye another reunion. arts.ttl: Manager ‘seeks to distance himself’ from Southampton vacancy drama – No serious worry building yet
arts.sum: Southampton are yet to appoint a new manager after parting ways with Russell Martin at the weekend. The Premier League side have been linked to a few candidates including Santa Clara boss Vasco Matos. This was initially reported in the UK and these claims were relayed by the Portuguese press. Liverpool have ‘no intention’ of pursuing Real Madrid swap deal
arts.sum: Liverpool have no intention of pursuing a swap deal with Real Madrid involving Ryan Gravenberch and Aurelien Tchouameni. Real Madrid are understood to have been impressed by Gravenberch’s performances this season with the midfielder having developed into a key figure for the Reds.
